description_long: This bungalow features a rectangular, single-story structure with a low-pitched, multi-faceted roof that includes several rectangular skylights. The exterior walls are clad in a muted, concrete-like material with visible paneling and subtle red trim along the base. Large, open window and door spaces line the longer sides, providing ample natural light and ventilation, while the shorter ends have fewer openings. The building sits on a broad, paved platform that extends outward, suggesting a driveway or patio area. The roof's design is modern, with clean lines and geometric skylights, and the overall appearance is utilitarian yet contemporary. The interior is likely open and spacious, with unfinished or industrial-style surfaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a low-pitched, multi-faceted roof featuring skylights, concrete panel walls, and large open windows, set on a wide paved base.
description_view_0: This view highlights the open garage-like entrance on the short side and the arrangement of skylights on the roof.
description_view_1: This side view shows the long facade with multiple large window openings and the full expanse of the paved base.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the opposite short side, also with a large open entrance and visible roof skylights.
description_view_3: This view displays the rear long facade with its series of window openings and the extended paved area.
